statement: Import location — Import should exist for offline updates/recovery but live quietly inside Project Metadata — Project Metadata Island, import modal, backup import utility.
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User can recover/update when needed without cluttering main
